description: Evaluates incident management maturity—service governance, KPIs/KRIs, unified incident and triage processes, tabletop exercises, predictive analysis, containment, threat hunting, response planning and team, breach notification, digital forensics, ticketing, AI incident orchestration, and AI-assisted triage.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: An incident management service exists, is scoped appropriately, and is reviewed on a regular cadence for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise incident management service exists
Regular incident management service efficacy review

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Incident management KPIs and KRIs—including mean time to respond (MTTR), mean time to contain, and AI triage accuracy—are documented and reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for incident management service
Regular KPI/KRI review
Mean time to respond and contain metrics
AI triage accuracy and escalation rates

capabilities.name: Incident and triage process
capabilities.description: Formalized enterprise-wide incident management and triage processes use SOAR and are reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Formalized documented enterprise-wide incident management process
Formalized documented enterprise-wide triaging process
SOAR utilized as part of incident management and triaging
Regular incident and triage process review

capabilities.name: Incident management table top exercises
capabilities.description: The enterprise conducts tabletop exercises for high-impact threat scenarios and implements recommendations.
evaluation_focus: Tabletop exercises for high-impact threat scenarios
Review and implement tabletop exercise recommendations

capabilities.name: Predictive analysis
capabilities.description: The incident management system uses predictive analysis automatically based on traffic patterns and baselines.
evaluation_focus: Predictive analysis for threat scenarios
Automatic prediction based on traffic patterns and baselines

capabilities.name: Effective containment
capabilities.description: Segmentation and incident processes contain day-zero attacks with automatic containment where possible.
evaluation_focus: Segmentation and processes to contain day-zero attacks
Automatic threat and attack containment

capabilities.name: Threat hunting
capabilities.description: A formalized threat hunting process is automated, staffed with skilled personnel, and supported by the incident management system.
evaluation_focus: Formalized documented threat hunting process
Automated threat hunting with skilled personnel
Incident management system threat hunting automation

capabilities.name: Incident response plan and contacts
capabilities.description: A formalized documented incident response plan lists all necessary points of contact and is reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Formalized documented incident response plan
Points of contact listed in incident management plan
Regular incident response plan review

capabilities.name: Incident response team
capabilities.description: A clear documented hierarchy and cross-functional representation support incident response.
evaluation_focus: Documented incident management hierarchy and first responder steps
Cross-functional incident response team representation

capabilities.name: Security breach notification
capabilities.description: A formalized breach notification process is reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Formalized documented breach notification process
Regular breach notification process review

capabilities.name: Digital forensics
capabilities.description: Digital forensics capability includes formalized artifact capture, automatic key artifact collection, and quarterly review.
evaluation_focus: Digital forensics capability
Formalized documented forensic artifact capture process
Automatic key artifact capture before forensics
Regular digital forensics process and technology review

capabilities.name: Incident ticketing and AI orchestration
capabilities.description: A ticketing system registers incidents and uses AI to automate and orchestrate incident handling workflows with analyst oversight.
evaluation_focus: Ticketing system for incident registration
AI for automated incident handling orchestration
Analyst oversight of AI-orchestrated incident workflows

capabilities.name: AI-assisted incident triage
capabilities.description: AI assists initial incident classification, severity scoring, and routing to appropriate response teams.
evaluation_focus: AI-assisted incident classification and severity scoring
Automated routing to response teams based on triage
Human validation of AI triage decisions

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
